title: Product-Led Growth Readiness
promise: PLG readiness diagnostic for time to value, activation, signals, expansion, and virality.
audience: B2B and B2C SaaS founders, product, growth, sales, and customer-success leaders
description: Go-to-market readiness assessment across Time to Value, Activation & Self-Service, Product Signals & Data, Expansion & Virality. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate answer-support checks.
ogDescription: PLG readiness diagnostic for time to value, activation, signals, expansion, and virality.
